items.title: Robinhood and Interactive Brokers Stock Might Be Too Hot to Touch
items.description: Robinhood and Interactive Brokers could have room to rally, despite sharply higher valuations, according to a note Monday from Goldman Sachs.  Robinhood now trades at 65 times forward earnings, while Interactive Brokers trades at 31 times, according to FactSet.  The average multiple for stocks in the Financial Select Sector SPDR is just 17 times.

items.title: Grab These 3 Small-Cap Blend Mutual Funds for Amazing Returns
